L.-33004/99 vlk/kj.k EXTRAORDINARY Hkkx II—[k.M 3—mi&[k.M (i) PART II—Section 3—Sub-section (i) izkf/dkj ls izdkf'kr PUBLISHED BY AUTHORITY la- 996] ubZ fnYyh] cq/okj] fnlEcj 13] 2017@vxzgk;.k 22] 1939 No. 996] NEW DELHI, WEDNESDAY, DECEMBER 13, 2017/AGRAHAYANA 22, 1939 िव牵 मं灴ालय िव牵 मं灴ालय िव牵 मं灴ालय िव牵 मं灴ालय (राज瀡व िवभाग) (राज瀡व िवभाग) (राज瀡व िवभाग) (राज瀡व िवभाग) अिधसूचना अिधसूचना अिधसूचना अिधसूचना नई 琈द瀖ली, 13 琈दस瀓बर, 2017 सा.का.िन. सा.का.िन. सा.का.िन. सा.का.िन. 1509 1509 1509 1509(अ) (अ) (अ) (अ)....— — — —धन-शोधन िनवारण (अिभलेख犘 का अनुर楹ण) िनयमवाली, 2005 के िनयम 9 के उप-िनयम (17) के ख瀃ड (क) एवं ख瀃ड (ग) के अनुसरण म犆 क犆灶ीय सरकार एत獵ारा 31 माच榁, 2018 अथवा 灡ाहक 獧ारा खाता-आधा琇रत संबंध शु牲 करने क琉 ितिथ से छह माह, जो भी बाद म犆 हो, को 灡ाहक 獧ारा अपनी आधार सं榐या और 瀡थायी खाता सं榐या 琇रपो琙टग सं瀡था को 灹瀡तुत करने क琉 ितिथ के 牲प म犆 अिधसूिचत करती है। [अिधसूचना सं. 10/2017/फा. सं. पी.12011/11/2016-ई.एस.सैल-डीओआर] िब瀉लब कुमार न瀡कर, अवर सिचव MINISTRY OF FINANCE (Department of Revenue) NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 13th December, 2017 G.S.R. 1509(E).—In pursuance of clause (a) and clause (c) of sub-rule (17) of rule 9 of the Prevention of Money-laundering (Maintenance of Records) Rules, 2005, the Central Government hereby notifies the 31st March, 2018 or six months from the date of commencement of account based relationship by the client, whichever is later, as the date of submission of the Aadhaar Number, and Permanent Account Number or Form 60 by the clients to the reporting entity. [Notification No. 10/2017/F. No. P.12011/11/2016-ES Cell-DoR] BIPLAB KUMAR NASKAR, Under Secy. 7159 GI/2017 Uploaded by Dte. of Printing at Government of India Press, Ring Road, Mayapuri, New Delhi-110064 and Published by the Controller of Publications, Delhi-110054. -- 1 of 1 --
